pr.title: ft/ftKirby: decompile Kirby special N and Hi moves
pr.author: johnwinston

summary: PR 2322 decompiled several Kirby special-N and special-Hi routines across two ftKirby files: Final Cutter entry functions, inhale swallow-distance checks for item/fighter targets, and Pikachu-copy Skull Bash collision/wall-bounce handling. The slice includes a bot match report showing 2 new 100% matches and several high-but-not-complete improvements.

key_files.role: Decompiled Kirby Final Cutter entry routines and inhale swallow-distance helper routines; added ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby include and scoped dont_inline pragmas around swallow helper/callers.
evidence_refs: pr_body summary lists ftKb_SpecialHi_Enter, ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5EA8
diff: ftKb_SpecialHi_Enter and ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter replace decomp placeholders
diff: ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 and ftKb_SpecialN_800F5EA8 replace decomp placeholders
issue_comment match report lists 2 new matches in ftKb_SpecialN and 2 improved unmatched SpecialN helpers

key_files.role: Decompiled Pikachu-copy Skull Bash collision helpers and wall-bounce helper; added extern collision box declaration used by wall collision check.
evidence_refs: pr_body summary lists ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll, ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll, fn_80105978
diff: ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll, ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll, fn_80105978 replace decomp placeholders
issue_comment match report lists improvements for ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll, fn_80105978, ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll, and .sdata2

what_changed.text: Implemented ftKb_SpecialHi_Enter and ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter, resetting command and specialhi move variables, changing to ground/air Final Cutter startup motion states, spawning effect 0x494, and wiring efLib_PauseAll/efLib_ResumeAll as hitlag callbacks.

Implemented item-target inhale swallow check ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8: compute mouth-offset position from cur_pos, dat_attrs offsets, and facing_dir; compare item distance against squared inhale velocity; call it_802F2810 and branch to air/ground swallow transition helpers.

Implemented fighter-target inhale swallow check ftKb_SpecialN_800F5EA8 with the same mouth-offset and squared-distance structure, using ftCo_800BD19C/ftCo_800BD620 and separate air/ground transitions.
Added scoped #pragma dont_inline around ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 and around capture anim caller functions; PR body states this was to prevent MWCC from inlining 800F5DE8 into callers.
evidence_refs: diff: #pragma dont_inline on/off near ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 and capture anim callers
pr_body: 'adds a dont_inline pragma to prevent MWCC from inlining 800F5DE8 into its callers'

what_changed.text: Implemented ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll and ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll for Pikachu-copy Skull Bash transitions, including ground/air checks, motion-state changes preserving cur_anim_frame, callback reinstallation, and velocity normalization on wall collision.
Implemented fn_80105978 wall-bounce helper that flips model rotation and negates several velocity, acceleration, facing, and move-state direction fields.
evidence_refs: pr_body: wall-bounce helper reverses velocity/direction variables

smart_moves.text: Kept unknown helper name fn_80105978 rather than inventing a semantic global name, while using local role names such as fp, fp2, da, pos, and msid where roles are clear.
evidence_refs: diff: local variables in changed functions

smart_moves.text: Used existing typed Fighter fields and Kirby dat_attrs fields for inhale offsets and velocity rather than raw offsets or M2C_FIELD-style access.
For Final Cutter effects, restored hitlag pause/resume callbacks directly after effect spawn, matching the behavior described in the PR body.
evidence_refs: diff: efSync_Spawn(0x494), fp->pre_hitlag_cb = efLib_PauseAll, fp->post_hitlag_cb = efLib_ResumeAll
pr_body: effect pauses during hit freeze

decomp_lessons.lesson: Kirby inhale swallow checks can appear as a shared mouth-offset calculation followed by squared-distance comparison against specialn_inhale_velocity squared; item and fighter paths may differ only in target object and consume/capture helper calls.

When decompiling fighter effect startup, preserve post-call Fighter reloads if the generated code requires them; both Final Cutter enter functions call GET_FIGHTER again after ftAnim_8006EBA4 before setting effect/hitlag fields.
evidence_refs: diff: ftKb_SpecialHi_Enter reloads fp after ftAnim_8006EBA4
diff: ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter reloads fp after ftAnim_8006EBA4

decomp_lessons.lesson: For copied-move collision transitions, callback fields may need to be reinstalled after Fighter_ChangeMotionState, as shown by ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll and ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll setting death2_cb, take_dmg_cb, deal_dmg_cb, and x21F8 after state changes.
scope: Kirby copied Pikachu SpecialN collision transitions

naming_conventions.text: Local fighter pointers use fp and reloaded fighter pointers may use fp2 when a second GET_FIGHTER call is needed after a state-changing call.
evidence_refs: diff: Fighter* fp and Fighter* fp2 in ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll and ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll

naming_conventions.text: Kirby data attributes are abbreviated as da, and position temporaries use pos.
evidence_refs: diff: ftKb_DatAttrs* da and Vec3 pos in ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8/800F5EA8

naming_conventions.text: Unexplained helper fn_80105978 remains address-style, consistent with conservative naming when semantics are not promoted into a proven symbol name.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Scoped #pragma dont_inline on/off was added around ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 and around capture anim callers to prevent MWCC from inlining 800F5DE8 into callers.
evidence_refs: diff: #pragma dont_inline on/off surrounding ftKb_SpecialNCapture1_Anim and ftKb_SpecialAirNCapture_Anim
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Global standards treat pragmas as exceptions requiring narrow evidence. This PR slice provides author rationale and match-report context, but the bot report does not show all affected functions at 100%.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used explicit chained assignment in AirHi cmd_vars reset but separate reverse-order assignments in ground Hi; this may reflect MWCC codegen sensitivity rather than semantic difference.
evidence_refs: diff: ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter cmd_vars[0] = cmd_vars[1] = cmd_vars[2] = cmd_vars[3] = 0
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No review or objdiff detail explains why the assignment shapes differ.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used f64 for the item-distance path and f32 for the fighter-distance path, matching the helper return/use shape shown in the diff.
evidence_refs: diff: f64 dist = it_802F23AC(...) in ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8
diff: f32 dist = ftCo_800BD19C(...) in ftKb_SpecialN_800F5EA8
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The slice does not include compiler or objdiff details explaining the type choice.

review_feedback.text: No human review comments are present in the loaded PR slice.
Automated report by encounter recorded matched-code progress: 2 new 100% matches for ftKb_SpecialHi_Enter and ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter, plus high-percent improvements for five functions and .sdata2.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 or removing/adjusting the dont_inline pragmas.
Search for other Kirby SpecialN inhale helpers using specialn_x_offset_inhaled, specialn_y_offset_inhaled, and specialn_inhale_velocity.
Search for ftKb_Init_803CB758 declarations to confirm whether the extern was later moved to an owning header.
Search for fn_80105978 references or later semantic rename in Kirby copied Pikachu SpecialN code.
Look for follow-up objdiff/checkdiff reports for ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5EA8, ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll, and ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number, title, author, state, dates, changed files
human_pr_text: PR body summary and verification claim
raw_diff: full diff excerpt for two changed files
text_corpus: encounter issue comment with match report
notes: Changed files and implemented functions are strongly supported by full raw diff and changed_files metadata.
There are no loaded human review comments; reviewer intent cannot be inferred.

The PR body claims fuzzy_match_percent 100.0 for all functions, but the encounter report shows only two new 100% matches and several functions at 91.96% to 99.96%, so match status should not be generalized as all functions fully matched.
The dont_inline rationale is explicitly stated by the PR author, but no detailed compiler/objdiff trace is included in the slice.
The .sdata2 improvement is reported by the bot, but the diff excerpt does not show a direct data-source change beyond code changes and an extern declaration.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Kirby inhale helpers share mouth-offset squared-distance structure
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2322, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 and ftKb_SpecialN_800F5EA8 both compute an inhaled mouth position from cur_pos plus dat_attrs offsets and facing_dir, compare target distance to specialn_inhale_velocity squared, then branch to air/ground transition helpers after consuming/capturing the target.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Scoped dont_inline used for Kirby SpecialN helper inlining issue
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2322 added scoped #pragma dont_inline blocks around ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 and capture anim callers; the PR body says this was to prevent MWCC from inlining 800F5DE8 into its callers.
evidence_refs: diff: #pragma dont_inline around ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 and capture anim callers

source_update_candidates.title: ftKb_SpecialN.c contains Kirby Final Cutter and inhale SpecialN decomp work from PR 2322
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2322 changed src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN.c to implement ftKb_SpecialHi_Enter, ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8, and ftKb_SpecialN_800F5EA8, plus a dont_inline workaround for the item inhale helper.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped history for future Kirby SpecialN/SpecialHi matching and pragma cleanup searches.

source_update_candidates.title: ftKb_SpecialNNs.c contains Kirby copied-Pikachu Skull Bash collision helpers from PR 2322
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2322 changed src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNNs.c to implement ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll, ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll, and fn_80105978 for copied-Pikachu Skull Bash collision transitions and wall bounce handling.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped history for future copied-move collision decomp and possible fn_80105978 naming review.

source_update_candidates.title: Check whether ftKb_Init_803CB758 extern belongs in an owning header
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2322 added `extern ftCollisionBox ftKb_Init_803CB758;` directly in ftKb_SpecialNNs.c for ft_800824A0. Curator may want to check whether current source later moved this declaration to an owning header.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential header/source hygiene follow-up; not enough PR evidence to decide ownership.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's 'fuzzy_match_percent: 100.0 for all functions' as an accepted validation result; the loaded bot report contradicts this for several functions.
Do not infer that reviewers accepted dont_inline as a general style. The slice has no human review comments and global standards treat pragmas as narrow exceptions.
Do not rename fn_80105978 from this evidence alone; the PR kept the address-style name and no reviewer naming discussion is loaded.
